questions.text: Which of these is a renewable resource?
questions.explanation: Solar energy is renewable as it is continuously available. Petroleum, coal, and natural gas are non-renewable fossil fuels.

questions.text: Reuse is better than recycle for conservation.
questions.explanation: Reuse is better than recycle because it doesn't require energy for processing. Recycling requires energy to convert waste into new products.

questions.text: What is the main aim of sustainable development?
questions.correctAnswer: To meet present needs without compromising future generations' ability to meet their needs.
questions.explanation: Sustainable development aims to balance economic growth, environmental protection, and social equity for present and future generations.

questions.text: The Indira Gandhi Canal has brought greenery to ________ desert.
questions.explanation: The Indira Gandhi Canal has brought water to the Thar desert in Rajasthan, transforming it into green agricultural land.
